languages.text: "Придется посвятить меня в этот сговор. Иначе... Я слыша{mf|л|ла} переговоры и без труда найду того, кто будет рад узнать их содержание.".

traits.locale_text: "Придётся посвятить меня в этот сговор. Иначе... Я слыша{mf|л|ла} переговоры и без труда найду того, кто будет рад узнать их содержание.".

languages.text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."
languages.original_text: "Придется посвятить меня в этот сговор. Иначе... Я слыша{mf|л|ла} переговоры и без труда найду того, кто будет рад узнать их содержание.".

traits.locale_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."
"You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."
"You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

languages.text: “你必须让我参与你的谋划，不然的话……我听到了你们的通讯，要找个对内容感兴趣的人，那可是易如反掌。”
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: “你必须让我参与你的谋划，不然的话……我听到了你们的通讯，要找个对内容感兴趣的人，那可是易如反掌。”

languages.text: « Vous allez devoir m'intégrer à votre complot, autrement... j'ai entendu votre transmission et je n'aurai aucun mal à trouver quelqu'un que vos machinations intéresseront. »
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: « Vous allez devoir m'intégrer à votre complot, autrement... j'ai entendu votre transmission et je n'aurai aucun mal à trouver quelqu'un que vos machinations intéresseront. »

languages.text: "Ben de bu işe dâhil olmalıyım. Olmazsam... Konuştuklarınızı duydum, bunları öğrenmek isteyecek birilerini bulmakta zorlanacağımı sanmam."
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de bu işe dâhil olmalıyım. Olmazsam... Konuştuklarınızı duydum, bunları öğrenmek isteyecek birilerini bulmakta zorlanacağımı sanmam."

languages.text: «Tendrán que incluirme en esta conjura. De lo contrario... he escuchado su transmisión y no me costará encontrar a alguien interesado en descubrir su contenido».
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: «Tendrán que incluirme en esta conjura. De lo contrario... he escuchado su transmisión y no me costará encontrar a alguien interesado en descubrir su contenido».

languages.text: "Ihr werdet mich an dieser Verschwörung beteiligen müssen. Andernfalls ... Ich habe Eure Übertragung gehört und finde sicher jemanden, der sich für ihren Inhalt interessiert."
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr werdet mich an dieser Verschwörung beteiligen müssen. Andernfalls ... Ich habe Eure Übertragung gehört und finde sicher jemanden, der sich für ihren Inhalt interessiert."

languages.text: 「この計画には君も参加しなければならない。君が参加しなければ…君の通信を聞いた。その内容を学ぶことに熱心な人を探すのは容易だ。」
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."

traits.locale_text: 「この計画には君も参加しなければならない。君が参加しなければ…君の通信を聞いた。その内容を学ぶことに熱心な人を探すのは容易だ。」
